title: psychotria thomensis
intro: Psychotria thomensis is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, found only in East Timor. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psychotria thomensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and skin infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Psychotria thomensis is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
